Home

Sample Article — WebRidge Fixture

This is a minimal HTML document used to exercise the static fetch path. It contains enough real prose that trafilatura can confidently identify a main-content block and produce markdown output comfortably above the 200-character fallback threshold.

The spec says that the extracted markdown should preserve links and basic structure, and should not include the surrounding navigation, footer, or cookie banner chrome that wraps the article on a real site.

A second section

A second paragraph keeps trafilatura's confidence high. Lists are also useful:

  • Item one
  • Item two
  • Item three
Copyright 2026 — this footer should not end up in the markdown output.
